MiniSimmy2 — Legend & Guide

Environmental Cycles
The world cycles through Fertile → Normal → Drought periods. Fertile gives higher energy gain and reproduction. Drought increases drain and makes survival harder.
Modules (Tiers I–X)
Harvester
Increases energy from food zones and white particles. Higher tiers = larger pickup range.
Sensor
Better hazard detection and avoidance. Higher tiers = predictive dodging.
Mover
Helps escape the vortex center. Higher tiers = better spiral escape.
Resistant
Reduces energy drain, especially useful in Drought phases.
Explorer
Increases exploration and random movement. Helps avoid getting stuck.
Communicator
Strengthens pheromone signals and hazard warnings.
3 of the same module = upgrade to next tier.
Harvester
Sensor
Mover
Resistant
Explorer
Communicator
Voidheart Prestige (Incubator)
Forge Voidheart Shards in Inventory (1 trillion Crystals each). In the Incubator, spend shards to prestige a creature: the brain is preserved, all ordinary modules are stripped, and a permanent core specialization is distilled from the exact module composition (hybrids like Void Garden, Storm Shell, Null Harmony, etc.). Cost scales with generation and prior prestiges. Use Cycle Again when a cycle completes to keep incubating without claiming.
Tech Tree
Open Tech Tree below the main menu. Spend crystals within each tier, then pay the gate cost to unlock deeper tiers. Perks include Crystal Resonance (bonus crystals on prestige), Incubator Insight (faster cycles), Module Resonance, Anomaly Spawner, Evolution Leak, Crystal Lattice (vault score + multi-echo spawns), Auto-Prestige Protocol, and God-Tier Ascendant modules. Aether Sovereigns (crown icon) are a premium currency shown in the top bar — spending coming soon.
Inspector Portrait Colors
Normal — dark gray
Predator — deep red
Social pressure — orange
Infection — purple
Yellow → Brown Honey Blooms
Creatures deposit honey that slowly moves toward food nodes. When it stops, it becomes a new food patch.
Green Energy Orbs
Released on death. Magnetize to any lace line (resonance arc or weak bond) to feed the network, tighten tension, boost repro, and push rival cores — or drift to food nodes for zone food and High Roller Points.
Purple Infection Particles
Prune mode spores — infect creatures on contact. Inspector background turns violet until cured with white particles.
Red Hazard Particles
Dangerous threats (AOE + DoT). Can be toggled in the Cheats Store.
Cursor Hazard Tool
Mouse becomes a damaging red particle. Buy in the Cheats Store.
Current Version: v2.01
Gene Vault slots are now fully purchasable and persistent. Higher tier modules give better prestige value.

Trends (rolling window) Presets or custom filters below

Extract to Egg

Extract brain + modules into an egg — from 40K score, scales with generation & module count

Egg Inventory

Hold up to 10 eggs — tap slot numbers to assign to Incubator or Gene Vault.

0/10 eggs
Extract creatures in the Inspector, then route eggs here. 0/50 ammo slots

Gene Vault

Store eggs across prestiges. Score mult = egg value × slot upgrade. Unlock slots 500K→10B.

Occupied slots stack egg score mults — stronger eggs = bigger boost. Quick-assign via Egg Inventory → tap vault slot #

Incubator

Cycles cost score (from 250K, scales sharply with slot level, generation & module count). Unlock slots 500K→10B · automate 1/5m + continuous score upkeep.

Automation auto-cycles, drains score continuously, and improves occupied slots. Egg Inventory → Auto-Slot per egg or Auto-Slot All

Module Tier Multipliers

Each boost doubles in power. Crystal cost doubles per tier (1, 2, 4…). Tap a tier to upgrade it, or upgrade all at once.

Incubator Slot Upgrades

Each upgrade boosts sell value, cycle rewards, and slightly speeds incubation. Tap a slot or upgrade all unlocked slots.

Gene Vault Slot Upgrades

Each upgrade multiplies stored egg score. Tap a slot or upgrade all unlocked vault slots.

Resource Conversion

Spend score for dust without prestiging — or prestige for 2.5× more dust plus a full reset. 1e9 mg dust = 1 crystal · 1T crystals = 1 voidheart · 1T voidhearts = 1 sovereign. Score auto-converts to dust when near the cap to prevent overflow.

Squid Control

Toggle automated jellyfish spawns and duel behavior. Manual scoop and Belly modal are unaffected.

0
Active
0
Automated
0
Feast duel
Automated generation
Master gate for colony emergence and lace special-white hatches.
Colony emergence
Crowded lace colonies fold rejected kin into defense bells.
Lace special-white spawn
Special whites on resonance links hatch bare vault/wild bells.
Squid duels
Overlapping bells clash, steal tendrils/probes, chase rivals — no squid-to-squid lattice links.
Direct burst pop
Hazards, ship fire, duel bump-pops, and direct scoop hits burst stripped bells.
Squids duel and loot gear — they do not weave lattice links to each other. local-033

Residual Refinement Bonus: —
On death, Vital Yield converts to Score. Sent to the forge, it's banked as Vital Essence in the egg and paid out as Score when you crack the egg open.
